text:
The Eight-legged Dog is a small multiple-legged animal found in a forest outside Doli City, in the Republic of Rokario. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 218 

Appearance

The Eight-legged Dog resembles a bear cub with a dog's head. 

Behavior

The Eight-legged Dog appears to be a relatively timid creature. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

While walking in a forest outside of Doli, Gon and Killua see an Eight-legged Dog come out of the bushes, but they ignore it and walk on. 

References

 

fr:Chien_à_8_pattes
